name: faq_shipping_returns_8_pages_faqs

observed_strengths.observation: A dedicated FAQ page exists and is linked in the footer, giving shoppers a self-serve support surface
Newsletter 'Subscribe' capture is present in the page footer, providing an email-list entry point

missing_or_weak.observation: FAQ content leads with brand/history trivia ('Who first discovered tea?') rather than shipping, returns, and delivery-time questions that resolve purchase objections
No FAQ structured data (FAQPage JSON-LD), so the Q&A content is not eligible for search rich results

purchase_path_notes: FAQ supports the funnel but under-serves logistics questions; shipping/returns reassurance is not front-loaded.
